ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sync all instances of a section when any is edited
ast.target: 编辑任一部分时自动同步该部分的所有实例

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delimit sections with ::tag (open) and ::tag:: (close) instead of a blank line
ast.target: 使用 ::tag（开始）和 ::tag::（结束）而非空行来分隔部分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Draw a colored left border on lines inside each section block, matching its tag color
ast.target: 在每个部分块内的行上绘制彩色左边框，颜色与其标签颜色匹配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tags that sync only their bar content (| … |), not body lyrics. Comma-separated.
ast.target: 仅同步其栏内容（| … |）而非正文歌词的标签。以逗号分隔。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Show song sections in this note
ast.target: 在此笔记中显示歌曲段落

ast.name: text
ast.source: ::Tag — syncs all instances  |  ::Tag* — local only  |  ::Tag:: — closing tag (when enabled)
ast.target: ::Tag — 同步所有实例  |  ::Tag* — 仅本地  |  ::Tag:: — 结束标签（启用时）
